/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Werror CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/tests/test_shutdown.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/epoll_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/connection_handler.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/thread_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/task_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/message_router.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/history_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/auth_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/test_shutdown.dir/src/signal_handler.c.o -o test_shutdown  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
